description_long: This rifle features a long, slender barrel with a matte black finish, complemented by a wooden stock and pistol grip. It is equipped with a telescopic scope mounted on top, indicating its use for precision shooting at distance. The rifle has a prominent bipod attached near the front, providing stability for prone or bench firing positions. The magazine is a large, box-type design, likely detachable, and is positioned just ahead of the trigger guard. The muzzle appears to have a suppressor or similar device attached, reducing noise and muzzle flash. The overall design suggests a high-powered, bolt-action or semi-automatic sniper or marksman rifle, suitable for urban overwatch or tactical scenarios.
description: A long-barreled, black and wood rifle with a scope, bipod, large box magazine, and a suppressor at the muzzle, designed for precision shooting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel, bipod legs, and the cylindrical suppressor at the muzzle.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the wooden stock, pistol grip, mounted scope, bipod, and large box magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the stock, scope alignment, and the symmetry of the bipod and barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the magazine and bipod.
